meaning: n.[植]苎麻,(纺织等用的)苎麻纤维
examples: I look in the empty white ramie song ci.
Isunte ramie (linen, hemp) fibers resist solarization.
Thus, sodium hydroxide was used in this work for the pretreatment of ramie fiber.
Ramie fibres are split from the plant by fingernail and twisted into threads by hand.
The region of Hansan, Republic of Korea, boasts fertile land and sea winds that allow ramie plants to thrive.
